description_long: This ornate armchair features a high, elaborately carved wooden frame finished in gold, with intricate floral motifs crowning the top and accenting the arms and legs. The upholstery is a rich, deep purple velvet, with a tufted backrest that adds both texture and elegance. The seat and armrests are generously padded, providing a plush and comfortable sitting experience. Decorative nailhead trim outlines the edges of the upholstery, enhancing the luxurious appearance. The legs are curved and carved, matching the overall baroque-inspired aesthetic. This armchair exudes a regal and vintage charm, making it a striking piece suitable for upscale urban environments such as boutique hotel lobbies or stylish sidewalk cafes.
description: A luxurious, gold-trimmed armchair with deep purple velvet upholstery, tufted backrest, and ornate carved details. Plush padding and decorative nailhead trim complete its regal, vintage look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plush purple velvet seat, padded armrest, and ornate gold-trimmed frame with visible carved details.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the curved, high backrest with gold trim and solid purple velvet upholstery, as well as the carved wooden legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the padded armrest, gold-accented frame, and the curvature of the backrest and legs.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the tufted backrest, wide seat, padded armrests, and the elaborate gold carvings on the frame.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, gold-trimmed, curved with carved details
attribute_backrest_style: high, tufted, and ornately carved with a crown-like top
attribute_leg_type: curved, carved wooden legs with gold finish
